element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic established in first stage
Pattern recognition and advanced bomb timing
Cumulative skill test combining all mechanics

element_introduction_order.element: Multiple playable characters (story and battle modes)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Available from story start and battle mode
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Character selection based on playstyle preferences

typical_tension_triggers: Confined maze spaces with limited escape routes
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade-style fast-paced action with cyclical bomb timing creating rhythmic tension spikes; story mode progression builds through element-themed worlds with escalating difficulty

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like stages teaching bomb placement, block destruction, and basic movement patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of power-up management and positioning strategy; encounters with individual Dastardly Bombers
difficulty_curve.late_game: Cumulative difficulty spike with multiple simultaneous threats; Bagular final boss requires mastery of all mechanics
notable_spikes: First Dastardly Bomber encounter marks transition from exploration to combat focus
Final boss Bagular represents maximum difficulty requiring pattern recognition and precise timing

notable_level_patterns.description: Story mode stages organized around thematic element worlds (as referenced in plot: 'element themed stars') where Five Dastardly Bombers cause havoc; spatial layouts vary by theme
Dedicated stages featuring individual Dastardly Bomber confrontations; requires tactical bomb placement and enemy behavior prediction
Multiplayer-focused symmetric or asymmetric maze designs supporting up to five players simultaneously; emphasis on instant action over exploration
